name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Not when we're this close
body:
#
Bernie Supporters -
There's no denying this: we're in the most important stretch of the campaign. With 26 primaries and caucuses in the next three weeks, there are almost enough delegates at stake to decide the whole election.
We can't let up. Not now. Not when we're this close.
Bernie doesn't have a super PAC. He doesn't have any millionaires or billionaires who'll step in. But Bernie has you.
**So to show our strength to the billionaire class, we made a goal of our supporters making 50,000 individual contributions allin one day.** Can Bernie count on you to hit our goal today? We're still short right now.
[**Make a $3 contribution right now to help us reach our goal of 50,000 individual contributions today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/50k-contributions?refcode=em160226sub-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/50k-contributions?refcode=em160226sub-a")
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/50k-contributions?refcode=em160226sub-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/50k-contributions?refcode=em160226sub-a")
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/50k-contributions?refcode=em160226sub-a "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/50k-contributions?refcode=em160226sub-a")**
We can do this. I know we can. Thanks for joining us to make it happen.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Ed Brookover
subject: It's important to understand this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33825993:s21kU2CVN:m:1:876315805:1F7F05EE23E96513058DD4EEBC3588A5:r)
---

Peter,

If you turn on the news, all you'll hear about is "Super Tuesday," coming up on March 1st.

**As we get closer, there are a few important things to understand, and two ways you can immediately help Dr. Carson.**

Here's the bottom line -- securing the Republican nomination is a math game. It's about securing delegates and on Super Tuesday, 12 states will vote and 595 delegates -- nearly 25 percent of the total number -- will be rewarded.

While the media will focus on who comes in first, delegates will mostly be rewarded proportionally -- meaning that candidates will secure delegates even if they don't win states.

The good news is that Dr. Carson should be very competitive in a number of these states and we intend to collect a good number of delegates.

**So how can you help Dr. Carson right now? It's very simple.**

**[First, your immediate donation of $12 or more will bolster our Get Out The Vote efforts in the 12 Super Tuesday states. Every dollar will translate into more voters we can target.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33825993:s21kU2CVN:m:1:876315805:1F7F05EE23E96513058DD4EEBC3588A5:r)**

**Second, if you live in one of the Super Tuesday states, please vote for Dr. Carson on Tuesday. If instead you have family or friends there, please ask them to do so.**

Specifically, those states are Alabama, Alaska, Arkansas, Georgia, Massachusetts, Minnesota, Oklahoma, Tennessee, Texas, Vermont, Virginia and Wyoming.

So that's where we are. No matter how you slice it, Tuesday is a huge opportunity for us.

If we perform well and beat expectations, it's going to change the state of the race.

[**If we don't, the road ahead is going to become much more difficult, particularly in regards to raising the necessary funds. So your immediate donation now of just $12 is crucial.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33825993:s21kU2CVN:m:1:876315805:1F7F05EE23E96513058DD4EEBC3588A5:r)

Dr. Carson is going to continue being positive, sharing his values and solutions, and speaking for the millions of Americans who for far too long have been ignored by our government.

Thank you for your ongoing support. We can't do this without you.

Sincerely,

Ed Brookover
Campaign Manager
Ben Carson for President**

name: Rand Paul
subject: Maybe under the cushion?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

Do you have happen to have a spare $159,034
laying around?

Perhaps it's hiding under a couch cushion
somewhere?

As an American taxpayer, that's your share of
our ballooning $19 TRILLION national debt.

Even with our debt increasing every day,
politicians in BOTH parties tell you there's nowhere to cut!

As one of the few fiscal conservatives in the
U.S. Senate, I've made it my mission to ensure the American
people understand how their taxpayer dollars are being wasted.

As a result, I'm being targeted by big
spending Democrats in 2016. But I'm not backing down.

In fact, earlier this week, I proposed
simple, common-sense cuts from my Waste Report to the Senate
Budget Committee.

Now I'm asking you to sign your name urging
them to do so, and make your most generous contribution of $50,
$25 or even $10 right away.

Anyone with a shred of common-sense
understands our federal government wastes money.

Both parties are to blame.

Should the American people really be paying
$6 million to promote tourism in Albania?

Or nearly a half-a-million dollars for
climate change video games?

Or $15.6 million for foreign students'
college tuition?

Or $43 million for a gas station in
Afghanistan?

Patriot, politicians in Washington, D.C.
today have gotten it in their heads that your money is theirs,
and they can spend it however they want.

In the process, they're taxing and spending
this country into oblivion.

I don't have a spare $159,034 laying around
to pay for it all.

If you don't either, we must stop this
madness.

Please take action right way by urging the
Senate Budget Committee to include my cuts in 2017 Budget.

And if possible, please agree to a generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away to help me keep
fighting for you.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

GIVE $10 TODAY >>

GIVE $25 TODAY >>

GIVE $50 TODAY >>

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate

Or nearly a half-a-million dollars for climate change video games? Or $15.6 million for foreign students' college tuition? Or $43 million for a gas station in Afghanistan? Patriot, politicians in Washington, D.C. today have gotten it in their heads that your money is theirs, and they can spend it however they want. Please take action right way by urging the Senate Budget Committee to include my cuts in 2017 Budget. name: Mark Campbell
subject: It's time to coalesce around Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Dear Friend,

Much like football, the race for the Republican nomination is a
long game. Two minutes into the first quarter, Donald Trump has
the delegate lead, and Ted Cruz is in second place.

The media may cover
it like it's over, but there's still a lot of time left.

After Super Tuesday,
we'll have completed the first quarter, and it will be more
obvious than ever that there are only two candidates with a path
the Republican nomination -- Donald Trump and Ted Cruz.

The coalition of
voters we have put together is not going to support an
establishment candidate such as Marco Rubio. He led the Gang of
Eight and the fight to pass amnesty despite telling voters he
opposed amnesty in his 2010 run for the Senate. Marco has never
stood up to own party, but Ted Cruz has repeatedly, and that is
one of the primary reasons Ted's supporters back him.

With Ted, we have
something extremely rare -- a candidate who has kept every
promise he has made to voters and someone who is leading fight
after fight on all the issues important to conservatives.

Americans are hungry
for a president who does exactly what he says -- not one who has
already betrayed their trust. Without Marco Rubio in the race,
Ted Cruz wins. Without Ted Cruz in the race, Donald Trump wins.
It's really as simple as that.

We need your help.
Spread the word on Facebook and Twitter or simply forward this
email to tell your friends and family it is time to coalesce
around a proven conservative who can win -- it's time to coalesce
around Ted Cruz:
https://www.tedcruz.org/its-time-to-coalesce-around-ted-cruz/

For liberty,

Mark Campbell
National Political
Director
Cruz for President

PAID FOR
BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT

body:
www.JoeSestak.com
CUP OF JOE

February 27th, 2016
Weekly Newsletter

Good morning! I wanted to provide an update about what I've been up to this past week. Thanks so much for reading. I appreciate your support.

Church, Chinatown, and Krishna Temple

Last Sunday, I had the honor of attending church services at Bethany A.M.E., a Chinese New Year Celebration Luncheon with the Philadelphia Chinese Community Organization United, and afternoon services at Mt. Airy Radha Krishna Temple.

This campaign really is about serving "We the People" -- which is why when I am Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator, I will represent all Pennsylvanians.

7 Cities, 36 Hours, and a Plan for Securing America in the 21st Century

This week I traveled to Lancaster, Philadelphia, Allentown, WilkesBarre, Erie, Pittsburgh, and Altoona to present my Plan for Securing America in the 21st Century.

In Lancaster, I talked about the increasingly asymmetric, geographic, and transnational nature of today's national security threats, which forces us to confront these challenges in new ways than in the past.

In Philadelphia, I discussed advancing Israeli safety by not only defending Israel's absolute right to exist as a state, but by implementing a two state solution to the Israeli-Palestinian conflict that gives enduring security to Israel.

In Allentown, I spoke with Muhlenberg College students and community members about countering Russian aggression through cooperation with our European neighbors and by leveraging our economic and diplomatic power to exert our influence over Russia, backed by a strong, agile military.

In Wilkes-Barre, I hosted a discussion on the need to ensure that China - the second largest economy in the world and our biggest economic competitor in the decades to come - respects the established rules of global trade, international security, and human rights.

In Erie, I discussed the economic tools of power projection such as the Export-Import Bank, and the role it plays in securing long-term national competitiveness in the global economy. I spoke about the 1,500 local workers who were laid off because Pat Toomey led the fight to let the Ex-Im Bank's charter temporarily expire.

In Pittsburgh, I spoke at Pitt Law about how even the Defense Department believes global climate change will aggravate problems such as poverty, social tensions, environmental degradation, ineffectual leadership and weak political institutions that threaten stability in a number of countries.

In Altoona, I discussed the need for a smart national security strategy to deal with a diversity of challenges. By "smart," I mean a strategy that allows us to deal with various challenges with equal effectiveness - from Russia to China to ISIS to North Korea.

If you missed me in person, you might have caught me on your local evening news -- check out the video compilation below!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FXPf2fIbCwE

Thanks for reading -- and please click the "contribute" button to keep our momentum going.

JOE

CONTRIBUTE

Twitter: twitter.com/JoeSestak
www.joesestak.com

Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: An unmistakable message
body:
#
When I first decided to run for president, my greatest fear was that if I were to run a poor campaign or did not do well, that it would be a setback not just for me, but for the ideas driving our campaign.
A lot of people said we had no chance. Our ideas are too big. The billionaire class is too powerful.
But we kept at it. We came to a virtual tie in Iowa, had a big win in New Hampshire, and made huge progress in Nevada.
**What you're doing is working.** Every contribution, every phone call and every door knocked is bringing our political revolution one step closer to winning the White House.
Now there's another big deadline, and it's Monday night: **the final FEC reporting deadline before SuperTuesday. It's a huge opportunity to show the strength of our movement.**
**[Please make a $3 contribution to our campaign and send an unmistakable message that you have had ENOUGH of the corrupt billionaire class buying our candidates and elections.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/an-unmistakable-message?refcode=em160227nd-3 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/an-unmistakable-message?refcode=em160227nd-3")**
There are twenty-six primaries and caucuses over the next three weeks, with thousands of delegates at stake. We're up against a billionaire class that doesn't want us to succeed, and they're willing to do anything it takes to stop our movement.
I'm so glad to have you at our side, sisters and brothers.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/an-unmistakable-message?refcode=em160227nd-3 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/an-unmistakable-message?refcode=em160227nd-3")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
